Our approach separates the measurement apparatus from the creative task itself, enabling scalable, task-agnostic assessment. Divergent creativity is measured using semantic entropy, a reference-free and robust metric for novelty and diversity, validated against human annotations, LLM-based novelty judgments and baseline diversity measures. Convergent creativity is assessed via a novel retrieval-based multi-agent judge framework that delivers context-sensitive evaluation of task fulfilment with over 60% improved efficiency. We validate our framework in three qualitatively distinct domains: problem-solving (MacGyver), research ideation (HypoGen), and creative writing (BookMIA), using a broad suite of LLMs. Empirical results show that our framework reliably captures key facets of creativity, including novelty, diversity, and task fulfilment, and reveal how model properties, such as size, temperature, recency, and reasoning, impact creative performance. Our work establishes a reproducible and generalizable standard for automated LLM creativity evaluation, paving the way for scalable benchmarking and accelerating progress in creative AI.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自动化、领域无关的LLM创造力评估框架，通过语义熵衡量发散创造力、基于检索的多智能体评判框架衡量聚合创造力，在三个不同领域验证了其可靠性，为可扩展、可复现的创造力基准测试建立了标准。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM创造力评估指标大多紧密耦合于特定任务，嵌入了领域假设，导致评估过程缺乏可扩展性和通用性，无法满足跨任务、自动化、规模化评估LLM创造力的需求。
AI.method: 提出了一种自动化、领域无关的LLM创造力评估框架：发散创造力通过语义熵（一种无参考、稳健的新颖性和多样性指标）度量，并经人工标注、基于LLM的新颖性判断和基线多样性指标验证；聚合创造力通过一种新颖的基于检索的多智能体评判框架进行评估，实现上下文敏感的任务完成度判断，效率提升超过60%。
AI.result: 在问题求解（MacGyver）、研究构思（HypoGen）和创意写作（BookMIA）三个定性不同领域，使用多种LLM进行验证，结果表明该框架能够可靠地捕捉新颖性、多样性和任务完成度等创造力核心维度，并揭示了模型规模、温度、时效性和推理能力等属性对创造性表现的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了可复现且可泛化的自动化LLM创造力评估标准，为可扩展的创造力基准测试提供了路径，有助于加速创意AI领域的发展。

title: Frozen Foundation-Model Embeddings Discard Small-Lesion Signal in Chest Radiography: Implications for Pre-Deployment Evaluation
summary: Frozen vision-transformer (ViT) foundation-model embeddings increasingly serve as the substrate for downstream chest-radiography (CXR) pipelines, yet where small-scale, low-contrast signal is retained or lost in the frozen forward pass has not been systematically quantified across architectures, pretraining domains, and objectives. We probed five frozen ViTs (RAD-DINO, DINOv2-B/14, DINOv3 ViT-7B, BiomedCLIP, MedSigLIP) and a frozen DINO-pretrained ResNet-50 architectural control across three large CXR cohorts (NIH-CXR14, MIMIC-CXR, Emory-CXR; aggregate pool n=492,724) and ChestX-Det10 (n=3,543; 1,462 small-lesion bounding boxes across Calcification, Nodule, Mass). Each model was evaluated with a small-scale-perturbation panel and a region-aware bounding-box-stratified probe on real lesions, comparing three pooling modes from the same forward pass: classification token (CLS), patch-mean (mean over all final-layer patch tokens), and bounding-box-restricted patch-local. On the perturbation panel, CLS embeddings sat at the chance floor (area under the ROC curve [AUC] 0.500-0.524); patch-mean was indistinguishable from CLS on iso-blur and reticular-fine cells but rose with CLS on larger directional-blur footprints, while disease AUC on globally decided tasks ranged 0.642-0.913. Patch-local probes recovered AUC ~1.0 from the same forward pass (per-model mean improvement +0.412 to +0.488); the ResNet-50 control reproduced the chance floor. On ChestX-Det10, image-level CLS classification showed within-class small-versus-large stratum gaps up to +0.243 AUC; bounding-box-level patch-local pooling on the same forward pass recovered AUC >= 0.899 on every (model x class) cell. Frozen ViT embeddings silently suppress small-scale signal at the global-aggregation step; the signal is recoverable from patch tokens conditional on a region of interest.

AI.tldr: 本文系统量化了冻结视觉Transformer基础模型在胸部X光片下游任务中对小尺度、低对比度病变信号的保留与丢失情况，发现全局聚合步骤（CLS和patch-mean）会静默抑制小尺度信号，但该信号可从patch token中基于感兴趣区域恢复。
AI.motivation: 冻结的视觉Transformer基础模型嵌入越来越多地被用作胸部X光片下游管线的基座，但不同架构、预训练领域和目标下，小尺度、低对比度信号在前向传播过程中是否被保留或丢失尚未被系统量化，这一研究空白是本文的核心动机。
AI.method: 本文探测了五个冻结ViT模型（RAD-DINO、DINOv2-B/14、DINOv3 ViT-7B、BiomedCLIP、MedSigLIP）和一个冻结DINO预训练ResNet-50架构对照，在三个大型CXR队列（NIH-CXR14、MIMIC-CXR、Emory-CXR，合计n=492,724）和ChestX-Det10（n=3,543，含1,462个小病灶边界框）上，采用小尺度扰动面板和区域感知的边界框分层探测真实病灶，比较了同一前向传播中的三种池化模式：分类令牌、patch均值、边界框限制的局部patch。
AI.result: 在扰动面板上，CLS嵌入处于随机水平（AUC 0.500-0.524）；patch-mean在等模糊和网状细粒度扰动上与CLS无异，但在较大方向性模糊足迹上随CLS上升；全局决策任务的疾病AUC范围为0.642-0.913。局部patch探测从同一前向传播中恢复AUC约1.0（每个模型平均改善+0.412至+0.488），ResNet-50对照复制了随机水平。在ChestX-Det10上，图像级CLS分类显示类内小病灶与大病灶层间AUC差距高达+0.243；同一前向传播的边界框级局部patch池化在每个（模型×类别）单元上恢复AUC≥0.899。
AI.conclusion: 冻结ViT嵌入在全局聚合步骤会静默抑制小尺度信号，但该信号可从patch token中基于感兴趣区域恢复，这为改进冻结视觉基础模型在医学影像小病灶检测中的应用提供了重要启示。

title: GraspLLM: Towards Zero-Shot Generalization on Text-Attributed Graphs with LLMs
summary: Research on Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) has gained significant attention recently due to its broad applications across various real-world data scenarios, such as citation networks, e-commerce platforms, social media, and web pages. Inspired by the remarkable semantic understanding ability of Large Language Models (LLMs), there have been numerous attempts to integrate LLMs into TAGs. However, existing methods still struggle to generalize across diverse graphs and tasks, and their ability to capture transferable graph structural patterns remains limited. To address this, we introduce the GraspLLM, a framework that combines Graph structural comprehension with semantic understanding prowess of LLMs to enhance the cross-dataset and cross-task generalizability. Specifically, we represent node texts from different graphs in a unified semantic space with a frozen general embedding model, on top of which we perform motif-aware contrastive learning across multiple motif-induced adjacency matrices to extract dataset-agnostic structural information. Then, with our proposed optimal contextual subgraph, we extract the most contextually relevant subgraph for each target node and align these subgraphs to the token space of LLM via an alignment projector. Extensive experiments on TAG benchmark datasets spanning diverse domains reveal that GraspLLM consistently outperforms previous LLM-based methods for TAGs, especially in zero-shot scenarios, highlighting its strong generalizability across different datasets and tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/Heinz217/GraspLLM.

AI.tldr: 提出GraspLLM框架，通过将图结构理解与大语言模型语义理解能力结合，利用冻结的通用嵌入模型统一语义空间、模体感知对比学习提取跨数据集无关结构信息，以及最优上下文子图对齐投影，显著提升了文本属性图模型在跨数据集和跨任务上的泛化能力，在零样本场景下表现尤为突出。
AI.motivation: 现有将大语言模型集成到文本属性图（TAG）中的方法在跨不同数据集和任务时泛化能力不足，且对可迁移图结构模式的捕获能力有限，难以实现通用的图结构理解与语义理解的统一。
AI.method: GraspLLM框架首先利用冻结的通用嵌入模型将不同图的节点文本映射到统一语义空间；随后在多个模体诱导的邻接矩阵上执行模体感知对比学习，提取数据集无关的结构信息；最后通过最优上下文子图机制为每个目标节点提取上下文最相关子图，并经由对齐投影器将这些子图映射到大语言模型的token空间，实现图结构与语义的对齐。
AI.result: 在覆盖多个领域的TAG基准数据集上的大量实验表明，GraspLLM在各类场景下均一致优于以往基于LLM的TAG方法，尤其在零样本场景中表现突出，充分证明了其跨数据集和跨任务的强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了通过统一语义空间、模体感知对比学习与上下文子图对齐投影相结合，能够有效提升LLM在TAG任务上的跨场景泛化能力，为构建通用图-语言模型提供了可行方案，代码已开源便于后续研究。

title: Adv-TGD: Adversarial Text-Guided Diffusion for Face Recognition Impersonation Attacks
summary: The widespread adoption of face recognition (FR) technologies raises serious privacy concerns, as facial data can be exploited without consent. To address this challenge, we propose Adv-TGD, a generative adversarial attack framework that synthesizes photorealistic faces capable of impersonating target identities and deceiving face recognition systems. Built upon Stable Diffusion, Adv-TGD performs per-sample LoRA fine-tuning conditioned on concise textual prompts to generate natural yet adversarially manipulated identities. Unlike conventional identity-attack approaches, our method optimizes lightweight cross-attention adapters for each source-target pair within a single-step denoising process. Latent blending is constrained by a face-local heatmap mask to ensure spatially precise identity manipulation while preserving non-sensitive regions. We introduce a composite objective that integrates masked epsilon-MSE reconstruction, thresholded identity divergence in FR embedding space, directional feature alignment, and source-similarity suppression to balance adversarial attack and visual realism. Optionally, LLaVA-generated attribute prompts enhance fine-grained semantic details without reintroducing identity cues. Under the black-box evaluation protocol, Adv-TGD attains an average attack success rate (ASR) of 85.90% across IR152, IRSE50, MobileFace, and FaceNet, surpassing the semantic SOTA baseline Adv-CPG by +6.25 points, diffusion-based makeup method DiffAIM by +3 points, and noise-based P3-Mask by +16 points. Despite its strong attack efficacy, Adv-TGD preserves high visual fidelity (PSNR = 27.15 dB, SSIM = 0.981). Furthermore, we demonstrate the flexibility of our framework by successfully extending it to in-the-wild datasets (LADN), general object classification (ImageNet), and transformer-based diffusion models (FLUX.1).

AI.tldr: Adv-TGD提出了一种基于Stable Diffusion的生成式对抗攻击框架，通过每样本LoRA微调和潜在空间混合，在保持高视觉真实感的同时，实现对黑盒人脸识别系统的高成功率身份伪装攻击（平均ASR 85.90%）。
AI.motivation: 人脸识别技术的广泛普及带来了严重的隐私泄露风险，面部数据可能被未经授权地滥用。现有身份攻击方法（如噪声扰动或语义级对抗样本）在攻击成功率与视觉真实性之间难以兼顾，亟需一种既能有效欺骗人脸识别系统又能生成自然逼真人脸图像的对抗攻击方法。
AI.method: Adv-TGD基于Stable Diffusion构建生成式对抗攻击框架，对每个源-目标身份对执行单步去噪过程中的LoRA微调，优化轻量级交叉注意力适配器；通过受面部局部热图掩码约束的潜在空间混合，确保身份操控在空间上精准且保留非敏感区域；引入复合损失函数，包括掩码epsilon-MSE重构、FR嵌入空间中的阈值化身份散度、方向特征对齐以及源相似度抑制，以平衡攻击效能与视觉真实性；可选地利用LLaVA生成属性提示以增强细粒度语义细节。
AI.result: 在黑盒评估协议下，Adv-TGD在IR152、IRSE50、MobileFace和FaceNet四个FR系统上达到平均85.90%的攻击成功率，分别超越语义级SOTA基线Adv-CPG 6.25个百分点、基于扩散的化妆方法DiffAIM 3个百分点和噪声基方法P3-Mask 16个百分点；同时保持高视觉保真度（PSNR=27.15 dB, SSIM=0.981）。该框架还成功扩展到野外数据集LADN、通用物体分类任务ImageNet以及Transformer架构扩散模型FLUX.1。
AI.conclusion: Adv-TGD证明了基于扩散模型的生成式对抗框架能够在不牺牲视觉真实感的前提下实现高成功率的身份伪装攻击，为隐私保护研究提供了新的技术路径；其良好的跨数据集、跨任务和跨模型泛化能力进一步验证了框架的灵活性与通用性，对未来人脸隐私防御机制的设计具有重要的启示意义。

title: Toward Generalist Autonomous Research via Hypothesis-Tree Refinement
summary: Scientific progress depends on a repeated loop of exploration, experimentation, and abstraction. Researchers test candidate directions, interpret the evidence, and carry the resulting lessons into later attempts. We study how an AI agent can run this loop autonomously over long horizons. We introduce Arbor, a general framework for autonomous research that combines a long-lived coordinator, short-lived executors, and Hypothesis Tree Refinement (HTR), a persistent tree that links hypotheses, artifacts, evidence, and distilled insights across time. The coordinator manages global research strategy over the tree, while executors implement and test individual hypotheses in isolated worktrees. As results return, Arbor updates the tree, propagates reusable lessons, refines the search frontier, and admits verified improvements. This design turns autonomous research from a sequence of local attempts into a cumulative process in which strategy, execution, and evidence are carried across time. We evaluate Arbor under Autonomous Optimization (AO), an operational setting where an agent improves an initial research artifact through iterative experimentation without step-level human supervision. Across six real research tasks in model training, harness engineering, and data synthesis, Arbor achieves the best held-out result on all six tasks, attaining more than 2.5x the average relative held-out gain of Codex and Claude Code under the same task interface and resource budget. On MLE-Bench Lite, Arbor reaches 86.36% Any Medal with GPT-5.5, the strongest result in our comparison.

AI.tldr: Arbor 是一个通用自主研究框架，通过长寿命协调器、短寿命执行器和假设树精化（HTR）的持久树结构，将科学研究从局部试错转变为跨时间的累积过程。在六个真实研究任务中，Arbor 均取得最佳保留结果，平均相对保留增益超过 Codex 和 Claude Code 的 2.5 倍，并在 MLE-Bench Lite 上以 GPT-5.5 达到 86.36% 的 Any Medal 成绩。
AI.motivation: 科学研究依赖于探索、实验和抽象反复循环的累积过程，但现有 AI 系统通常将研究视作一系列孤立的局部尝试，缺乏跨时间保持策略、执行和证据的机制，无法实现长期自主研究。
AI.method: Arbor 框架包含三个核心组件：一个长寿命的全局协调器负责管理研究策略；多个短寿命的执行器在隔离工作树中实现和测试单个假设；以及假设树精化（HTR）——一种持久化的树结构，跨时间连接假设、工件、证据和提炼后的洞察。结果返回后，Arbor 更新树结构、传播可复用的经验教训、精炼搜索前沿并纳入已验证的改进。
AI.result: 在模型训练、工程实现和数据合成六类真实研究任务上，Arbor 在所有任务中均取得最佳保留结果，平均相对保留增益超过 Codex 和 Claude Code 的 2.5 倍。在 MLE-Bench Lite 基准上，Arbor 搭配 GPT-5.5 达到 86.36% 的 Any Medal 成绩，为比较中最强结果。
AI.conclusion: Arbor 通过将自主研究从局部试错转化为跨时间的累积过程，验证了持久化策略、执行与证据机制在长期自主研究中的有效性，为构建能独立开展完整科研循环的 AI 系统提供了通用框架。

title: Adapting Vision-Language Models from Iconic to Inclusive for Multi-Label Recognition Without Labels
summary: Understanding multi-label images remains a challenging task in computer vision. With the rapid progress of vision-language multimodal learning, vision-language models (VLMs) enable zero-shot recognition without labeled data. However, due to their intrinsic design, these models often prioritize the most iconic object and omit other contextual positives. This intrinsic bias conflicts with the nature of multi-label learning, thereby limiting their applicability. In this work, we propose an unsupervised framework that adapts VLMs from iconic recognition toward inclusive understanding, enabling label-free multi-label image recognition. Our approach consists of two key stages, ``cutting'' and ``sewing'': In the cutting stage, we present the multi-sampling response estimator to prevent the model from concentrating only on one single object. In the second sewing stage, the multi-object blend adaptation is introduced to adjust the labels to better conform to the multi-label distribution while preserving the intrinsic characteristics of the original model within only one epoch. Extensive experiments show that our framework significantly outperforms existing unsupervised approaches on four public datasets, even surpassing several representative weakly supervised baselines. These results demonstrate the potential of adapting pre-trained VLMs for more comprehensive visual understanding without manual annotations. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/iCVTEAM/TailorCLIP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TailorCLIP，一种无监督框架，通过"剪切"和"缝合"两阶段方法将视觉-语言模型从标志性识别适配为包容性理解，在无需标注数据的情况下实现多标签图像识别，并在多个数据集上显著超越现有无监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多标签图像识别依赖标注数据，而视觉-语言模型虽具备零样本能力，但其内在设计偏向识别最具代表性的单一物体，忽略了上下文中的其他正类目标，这与多标签学习的本质存在矛盾，限制了VLMs在多标签场景下的应用。
AI.method: 提出TailorCLIP无监督框架，包含两个阶段：在"剪切"阶段，引入多采样响应估计器（multi-sampling response estimator），防止模型仅聚焦于单个物体；在"缝合"阶段，提出多物体混合适应（multi-object blend adaptation），仅用一个epoch调整标签使其更符合多标签分布，同时保留原始模型的内在特性。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上进行的大量实验表明，该框架显著优于现有无监督方法，甚至超过了多个代表性的弱监督基线方法，证明了无需人工标注即可适配预训练VLM以实现更全面的视觉理解的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了通过无监督方式适配预训练视觉-语言模型能够有效克服其标志性识别偏向，实现包容性多标签理解，为无需人工标注的全面视觉理解提供了可行路径。

title: Soft-Prompt Tuning for Fair and Efficient LLM Benchmark Evaluation
summary: Benchmark scores often misrepresent a large language model's (LLM's) knowledge, because they rely, e.g., on the model's ability to follow specific formatting requirements. This especially penalizes base models that may know the correct answers but lack the ability -- typically introduced in post-training -- to structure them as instructed. To overcome this, we propose soft-prompt tuning, an efficient, fair, and architecture-agnostic model evaluation. By optimizing only 10 soft-prompt vectors (roughly 0.0006% parameters for a 7B model) over a short tuning period, we adapt models to specific benchmark formats, closing gaps in format-following and ensuring that underlying knowledge is accurately reflected in benchmark scores. This allows one to fairly compare different base models -- trained with various pre-training recipes -- on benchmarks without the need for full post-training. We evaluated soft-prompt tuning across 7 models and 7 datasets. The results show that (a) soft-prompt tuning saturates format-following within 80 steps (~640 samples) making it highly efficient, (b) soft-prompt tuning significantly outperforms zero- and few-shot prompting, surfacing base model knowledge that standard prompting misses, that (c) even post-trained models can benefit from soft-prompts to maximize format compliance, and that (d) soft-prompted base model performance predicts post-trained model rankings more reliably than zero- and few-shot baselines, offering a low-cost proxy for downstream model quality. Our contributions include (1) metrics which disentangle format-following and knowledge accuracy, (2) a fairer benchmarking protocol of LLM knowledge, and (3) a cost- and memory-effective recipe to identify optimal pre-training strategies early in LLM development.

AI.tldr: 提出基于软提示微调的公平、高效且架构无关的大模型评测方法，仅优化0.0006%的参数即可弥合格式遵循差距，使基座模型的知识能力得以准确反映于基准分数中，并在多种模型与数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基准评测分数往往因依赖模型的格式遵循能力而低估基座模型的实际知识水平，因为基座模型虽具备正确答案知识，却缺乏后训练阶段才引入的特定格式输出能力，导致评测结果无法公平反映模型间的真实知识差异。
AI.method: 提出软提示微调（soft-prompt tuning）作为评测方法，仅优化10个软提示向量（对7B模型约占总参数的0.0006%），通过短时间微调使模型适配特定基准格式，从而弥合格式遵循差距，无需完整的后训练流程即可公平比较不同预训练策略训练的基座模型。
AI.result: 在7个模型和7个数据集上的实验表明：(a) 软提示微调在80步（约640样本）内即可饱和格式遵循能力；(b) 显著优于零样本和少样本提示，揭示标准提示无法挖掘的基座模型知识；(c) 后训练后的模型也能从中获益以最大化格式遵循度；(d) 软提示微调后的基座模型性能比零/少样本基线更可靠地预测后训练模型的排名。
AI.conclusion: 软提示微调提供了一种低成本、高效率的基座模型评测代理指标，能够分离格式遵循与知识准确度，为早期LLM开发中识别最优预训练策略和预测下游模型质量提供了可行方案。

title: Learning Instance-Adaptive Low-Rank Orthogonal Subspaces for Clothes-Changing Person Re-Identification
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshop on CoLoRAI
summary: Clothes-changing person re-identification (CC-ReID) aims to recognize individuals despite drastic appearance changes caused by clothing variation. While existing methods rely on adversarial learning to disentangle clothing features, we propose Ortho-ReID, which explicitly models a low-rank clothing subspace from VLM text descriptions and extracts clothing-invariant representations via direct geometric constraints. A critical component is our transformer-based Basis Maker, which refines a shared, low-dimensional clothing prior into an instance-adaptive low-rank subspace through cross-attention with image patches, enabling robust clothing feature extraction even under varying visibility conditions. This instance-adaptive subspace is supervised via alignment with clothing text embeddings, while identity features are extracted via a learnable projection head and geometrically constrained to be strictly orthogonal to it. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on PRCC (+5.9% top-1), Celeb-reID-light (+3.5%), and LaST (+5.3%), with competitive results on LTCC.

AI.tldr: Ortho-ReID通过从VLM文本描述中显式建模低秩衣物子空间，并利用正交几何约束提取衣物不变的身份特征，在衣物换装行人重识别任务上取得了显著优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有衣物换装行人重识别方法依赖对抗学习来解耦衣物特征，但对抗训练不稳定且难以彻底分离衣物与身份信息，亟需一种更直接、几何意义明确的特征解耦方法。
AI.method: 提出Ortho-ReID框架，包含一个基于Transformer的Basis Maker模块，该模块通过跨注意力机制将共享的低维衣物先验与图像块交互，生成实例自适应的低秩衣物子空间；衣物子空间通过与大语言模型生成的衣物文本嵌入对齐进行监督，身份特征则通过可学习投影头提取，并通过严格的几何正交约束确保身份特征与衣物子空间正交。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上取得最优结果：PRCC上top-1提升5.9%，Celeb-reID-light提升3.5%，LaST提升5.3%，并在LTCC上取得具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模低秩衣物子空间并施加正交几何约束是一种比对抗学习更有效且更稳定的衣物无关特征提取策略，展示了利用视觉-语言模型先验指导细粒度视觉特征解耦的可行性与优越性。

title: Agentic Environment Engineering for Large Language Models: A Survey of Environment Modeling, Synthesis, Evaluation, and Application
summary: Environments serve as interactive systems for large language model (LLM) based agents across diverse scenarios and play a crucial role in driving the continual evolution of model capabilities. Despite this importance, existing work lacks a systematic categorization and deep analysis. This paper systematically studies current researches on agentic environments from the perspective of the environment engineering lifecycle, covering their modeling, synthesis, evaluation and application. Specifically, the paper first introduces representative environments from the perspectives of eight attributes and eight domains, providing detailed analyses of their development paths and highlighting their core capabilities. Second, for automated environment synthesis, two paradigms are introduced, such as symbolic synthesis and neural synthesis. This paper also shows different environment evaluation methods in each paradigm. Thirdly, the corresponding environment applications from the perspective of agent-environment co-evolution are discussed. In specific, the paper characterizes the primary pathways for agent evolution in dynamic environments from four complementary perspectives: memory-centric experience evolution, orchestration-centric workflow evolution, trajectory-centric offline evolution, and exploration-centric online evolution. And three paradigms of environment evolution are identified, namely neural-driven, difficulty-driven, and scaling-driven approaches. At last, several promising future directions are discussed, including Environment-as-a-Service, Multi-agent Environments, and Neural-Symbolic Environments.

AI.tldr: 本文从环境工程生命周期视角系统梳理了基于LLM的智能体环境研究，涵盖环境建模、合成、评估与应用，并提出了智能体-环境协同演化的多种路径与环境进化范式。
AI.motivation: 尽管环境在驱动LLM智能体能力持续进化中扮演关键角色，但现有工作缺乏对智能体环境的系统分类与深入分析，亟需一个统一框架来梳理环境建模、合成、评估及应用的全链条研究。
AI.method: 本文首先从八个属性和八个领域维度对代表性环境进行建模与分析，揭示其发展路径与核心能力；其次，归纳了符号合成与神经合成两种自动化环境合成范式及其对应的评估方法；再次，从记忆中心、编排中心、轨迹中心和探索中心四个互补视角刻画了智能体在动态环境中的进化路径，并识别出神经驱动、难度驱动和规模驱动三种环境进化范式。
AI.result: 本文系统性地对现有LLM智能体环境研究进行了分类与结构化梳理，提出了环境工程生命周期的完整分析框架，识别出多种环境合成范式、智能体-环境协同进化路径以及环境进化范式，并指出了环境即服务、多智能体环境与神经符号环境等未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为LLM智能体环境研究提供了系统化的分类与分析框架，揭示了环境在智能体进化中的核心作用，并为环境工程、智能体-环境协同进化以及未来环境即服务、多智能体环境等研究方向奠定了基础。

title: ARGUS: Stacked Multi-View Identity Mosaic Injection for Subject-Preserving Video Generation
summary: Subject-preserving video generation is not solved by frontal-face similarity alone: a generated person must remain recognizable across motion, large viewpoint changes, expression shifts, occlusion, scale variation, and conflicts among text, first-frame, and identity references. We argue that the central bottleneck is the point-reference paradigm, which collapses identity into a single static observation entangled with pose, accessories, lighting, background, and camera statistics. We introduce Argus, a Wan-based framework centered on Stacked Multi-View Identity Mosaic Injection (SMII). SMII converts MLLM-selected image/video identity evidence into a 3*3 stacked mosaic, synchronizes the mosaic with the current diffusion time, and injects it as negative-time read-only memory in Wan's native token space. This turns identity from an external clean adapter or a single reference image into a compact dynamic distribution. Around SMII, an MLLM Identity Director selects informative identity moments and resolves condition conflicts, while no-cross-pair counterfactual training, Temporal Identity Annealing, and Adaptive Self-Likeness Guidance improve robustness without paired subject-video supervision. We further release HardID-Celeb, a public-figure identity-stress benchmark, and introduce YawScore and OccScore to probe large-yaw and first-frame-occlusion robustness. Argus achieves state-of-the-art results on OpenS2V-Eval Human-Domain, reaching 64.38 Total Score, 71.86 FaceSim, 51.62 NexusScore, and 79.14 NaturalScore. On HardID-Celeb, Argus obtains 76.80 FaceSim and improves YawScore and OccScore by 12.60 and 15.10 points over the strongest baselines, demonstrating that dynamic identity memory and large-scale counterfactual self-supervision are highly effective for subject-preserving video generation.

AI.tldr: Argus提出基于堆叠多视角身份马赛克注入（SMII）的框架，将身份从单点参考范式转变为紧凑动态分布，结合多模态大模型身份导演、无配对反事实训练等机制，在人体视频生成的身份保持任务上取得SOTA，并发布了面向大偏航角和遮挡鲁棒性的HardID-Celeb基准。
AI.motivation: 现有主体保持视频生成方法依赖正面人脸相似度，但无法解决运动、大视角变化、表情变化、遮挡、尺度变化以及文本/首帧/身份参考之间的冲突问题；根本瓶颈在于点参考范式（point-reference paradigm）将身份坍缩为单个静态观测，该观测与姿态、配饰、光照、背景和相机统计信息纠缠在一起，导致身份保持鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: Argus基于Wan框架，核心是堆叠多视角身份马赛克注入（SMII），它将多模态大模型（MLLM）筛选的图像/视频身份证据转换为3*3堆叠马赛克，与当前扩散时间步同步后作为负时间只读内存注入到Wan的原生token空间，使身份从外部适配器或单张参考图像变为紧凑动态分布。围绕SMII设计了MLLM身份导演用于选择信息量丰富的身份时刻并解决条件冲突、无交叉对反事实训练（no-cross-pair counterfactual training）、时间身份退火（Temporal Identity Annealing）以及自适应自相似性引导（Adaptive Self-Likeness Guidance），无需成对主体-视频监督。
AI.result: 在OpenS2V-Eval Human-Domain上，Argus达到64.38 Total Score、71.86 FaceSim、51.62 NexusScore和79.14 NaturalScore，取得SOTA。在发布的HardID-Celeb基准上，Argus获得76.80 FaceSim，YawScore和OccScore相比最强基线分别提升12.60和15.10分。
AI.conclusion: 动态身份记忆和大规模反事实自监督（dynamic identity memory and large-scale counterfactual self-supervision）对于主体保持视频生成高度有效，将身份从单点静态参考转变为分布式的动态表征能够显著提升在大偏航角和遮挡等困难场景下的鲁棒性。

title: VIA-SD: Verification via Intra-Model Routing for Speculative Decoding
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Speculative decoding (SD) addresses the high inference costs of LLMs by having lightweight drafters generate candidates for large verifiers to validate in parallel. Existing draft-verify methods use binary decisions: accept or fully recompute. Yet we find that many rejected tokens can be verified correctly by a slim submodel derived from the full verifier via intra-model routing, instead of the full verifier. This motivates our slim-verifier to handle tokens requiring moderate verification resources, reducing expensive large-model calls. We propose Verification via Intra-Model Routing for Speculative Decoding (VIA-SD), a multi-tier framework using a routed slim-verifier. Draft tokens are processed hierarchically: direct acceptance for high-confidence cases, slim-verifier regeneration for medium-confidence cases, and full-model verification for uncertain cases. Across four representative tasks and multiple model families, VIA-SD reduces rejection rates by 0.10-0.22 and delivers 10-20% speedups over strong SD baselines, while achieving 2.5-3x acceleration over non-drafting decoding. Moreover, VIA-SD is compatible with existing SD frameworks without modifying their training procedures. Our results suggest multi-tier SD as a general paradigm for scalable and efficient LLM inference. Project page: https://zju-xyc.github.io/VIA-SD-Project-Page/

AI.tldr: VIA-SD 提出了一种基于模型内路由的多层投机解码框架，通过引入轻量级精炼验证器处理中等置信度的候选 token，在不修改训练过程的前提下显著降低拒绝率并提升推理速度，相比强基线方法实现 10-20% 的加速。
AI.motivation: 现有投机解码框架采用二元接受/完全重算决策，导致大量被拒绝的 token 仍需全量大型验证器重新计算，造成不必要的计算开销。
AI.method: VIA-SD 从完整验证器中通过模型内路由提取一个精简子模型作为精炼验证器，构建三级分层验证架构：高置信度 token 直接接受、中等置信度 token 由精炼验证器重新生成、低置信度 token 才交由完整验证器处理。
AI.result: 在四个代表性任务和多种模型族上，VIA-SD 将拒绝率降低 0.10-0.22，相比强基线投机解码方法获得 10-20% 的加速，且相比非投机解码实现 2.5-3 倍加速，同时兼容现有投机解码框架无需修改训练流程。
AI.conclusion: 多层投机解码可作为可扩展高效 LLM 推理的通用范式，实验表明通过分级验证策略能够在不妥协生成质量的前提下显著提升推理效率。

title: Parameter-Efficient Adapter Tuning for Tabular-Image Multimodal Learning
summary: Tabular-image multimodal learning aims to improve predictive modeling by jointly using structured tabular attributes and visual data. Although pretrained encoders provide strong modality-specific representations, full fine-tuning can be computationally expensive, while keeping encoders frozen may limit task-specific adaptation. We propose the Tabular-Image Adapter (TI-Adapter), a modality-specific adapter-based fine-tuning framework for efficient multimodal adaptation. TI-Adapter freezes the pretrained tabular encoder and learns an adapter after the extracted tabular embedding, while adapting the image branch with embedding-level and bottleneck-level adapters instead of full fine-tuning. Experiments on 20 tabular-image datasets show that TI-Adapter achieves competitive or better predictive performance than full fine-tuning while using substantially fewer trainable parameters. Ablation studies further demonstrate the importance of adapter placement for balancing performance and practical efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出TI-Adapter框架，通过冻结预训练表格编码器并在表格分支添加后置适配器、在图像分支引入嵌入级和瓶颈级适配器，实现表格-图像多模态学习的高效微调，在20个数据集上以远少于全微调的可训练参数达到相当或更优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的表格-图像多模态学习虽然可以利用预训练编码器获得强模态表示，但全微调计算成本高昂，而冻结编码器又会限制任务特定适应能力，因此需要一种在保持高效性的同时实现充分模态自适应的方法。
AI.method: 提出Tabular-Image Adapter (TI-Adapter)框架，采用适配器微调策略：冻结预训练表格编码器，在其输出的表格嵌入之后学习一个适配器；图像分支则不进行全微调，而是引入嵌入级和瓶颈级适配器以实现高效多模态自适应。
AI.result: 在20个表格-图像数据集上的实验表明，TI-Adapter在使用远少于全微调的可训练参数前提下，取得了与全微调相当甚至更优的预测性能。消融研究进一步验证了适配器放置位置对于平衡性能与实用效率的重要性。
AI.conclusion: TI-Adapter通过巧妙的适配器设计在计算效率和任务适应能力之间取得了有效平衡，表明适配器微调是多模态表格-图像学习中一个有前景的替代全微调方案，适配器的放置策略是影响性能的关键因素。

title: Measuring Epistemic Resilience of LLMs Under Misleading Medical Context
summary: Large language models (LLMs) now reach expert-level scores on medical licensing exams, encouraging the assumption that high scores imply safe medical judgment while patients increasingly use them for health advice. We show this assumption is fragile: when misleading context is injected into questions that LLMs originally answer correctly, they abandon the correct answer. We call the ability to maintain correct judgment under adversarial context epistemic resilience, and introduce MedMisBench to measure it. MedMisBench contains 10,932 medical question items and 48,889 misleading context-option pairs spanning medical reasoning, agentic capability, and patient-journey evaluation. Across 11 model configurations, mean accuracy falls from 71.1% on original questions to 38.0% under focused misleading context, with 51.5% attack success. The most damaging injections are formal, rule-like fabrications: authority-framed falsehoods reach 69.5% attack success and exception-poisoning claims reach 64.1%. A 14-member clinical panel from 7 countries identified serious potential harm in 38.2% of reviewed cases. MedMisBench exposes a structural blind spot in LLM evaluation in medical settings: existing benchmarks measure what models know, but not whether they preserve correct medical judgment under misleading context.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedMisBench基准，通过向医学问题注入误导性上下文来测试大语言模型的“认知韧性”，发现模型准确率从71.1%骤降至38.0%，揭示了现有基准仅评估知识而忽视模型在误导下保持正确判断能力的结构性盲点。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在医学考试中取得专家级分数，但高分数被假定等同于安全医疗判断，而患者越来越多地依赖LLM获取健康建议。本文揭示这一假设的脆弱性：当模型原本正确回答的问题被注入误导性上下文时，模型会放弃正确答案，而现有基准仅评估模型“知道什么”，无法衡量其在误导性语境下能否保持正确医疗判断。
AI.method: 本文引入“认知韧性”（epistemic resilience）概念，即模型在对抗性语境下保持正确判断的能力，并构建MedMisBench基准。该基准包含10,932个医学问答条目和48,889个误导性上下文-选项对，涵盖医学推理、智能体能力和患者旅程评估三个维度，通过向原始问题中注入误导性上下文来构造攻击样本。
AI.result: 在11个模型配置上，平均准确率从原始问题的71.1%降至聚焦性误导上下文下的38.0%，攻击成功率达到51.5%。最具破坏性的注入类型为权威框架下的虚假陈述（攻击成功率69.5%）和例外投毒式主张（64.1%）。由来自7个国家的14名临床医生组成的评审团认定，38.2%的审查案例存在严重潜在危害。
AI.conclusion: MedMisBench揭示了LLM在医疗场景下评估的结构性盲点：现有基准仅衡量模型的知识水平，而非其在误导性上下文中保持正确医疗判断的能力。误导性上下文能系统性地瓦解模型的医疗判断能力，即使是对原始问题回答正确的模型也难以抵御，这为LLM在高风险医疗场景中的安全部署敲响了警钟。

title: MedCTA: A Benchmark for Clinical Tool Agents
comment: Project Page: https://ivul-kaust.github.io/MedCTA/ Code: https://github.com/IVUL-KAUST/MedCTA Data: https://huggingface.co/datasets/IVUL-KAUST/MedCTA
summary: To make clinically grounded decisions, medical AI agents are expected to go beyond simple recognition and be capable of tool retrieval, evidence acquisition, and integration. Existing benchmarks largely evaluate isolated perception or single-turn question answering, and therefore provide limited visibility into failures of planning, tool recruitment, and rollout reliability. We introduce MedCTA, a benchmark for evaluating medical tool agents on clinician-validated, step-implicit tasks grounded in realistic multimodal clinical inputs, including radiology images, pathology slides, and reports. MedCTA comprises 107 real-world clinical tasks with clinician-verified executable trajectories over 5 deployed tools, and supports process-aware evaluation of tool selection, argument validity, execution stability, trajectory fidelity, and outcome quality. We benchmark 18 open- and closed-source multimodal models and find that even frontier systems remain brittle in multi-step clinical tool use: autonomous rollouts are dominated by protocol failures, premature stopping, and incorrect tool recruitment, while gold-standard tool routing yields large but still incomplete gains. These results show that strong backbone perception does not translate into reliable agentic behavior in clinical settings. MedCTA provides a rigorous testbed for auditing, diagnosing, and advancing trustworthy medical AI agents. The dataset and evaluation suite are available at https://ivul-kaust.github.io/MedCTA/

AI.tldr: MedCTA是一个面向医疗AI体在真实多模态临床输入下执行多步工具任务的基准测试，包含107个经临床验证的任务和5个部署工具，评估发现即使前沿多模态模型在临床场景中仍存在协议失败、过早停止和错误工具调用等问题，表明强感知能力无法直接转化为可靠的智能体行为。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗AI基准主要评估孤立的感知能力或单轮问答，无法有效检测AI体在临床决策中的规划失败、工具调用错误和执行可靠性问题，缺乏针对多步工具使用场景的评估基准。
AI.method: MedCTA构建了107个来自真实临床环境的任务，包含放射影像、病理切片和报告等多模态输入，配备临床专家验证的可执行轨迹和5个部署工具，支持对工具选择、参数合理性、执行稳定性、轨迹保真度和结果质量进行过程感知评估。
AI.result: 对18个开源和闭源多模态模型的基准测试表明，前沿系统在多步临床工具使用中表现脆弱：自主推出的错误以协议失败、过早停止和错误工具调用为主；即使使用gold-standard工具路由，性能虽有提升但仍不完善，证明强感知能力无法直接迁移为可靠的临床智能体行为。
AI.conclusion: MedCTA为审计、诊断和推进可信医疗AI体提供了严格的测试平台，揭示了当前多模态模型在临床多步工具使用场景中的系统性能瓶颈，指出了从感知到可靠智能体行为之间的关键差距。

title: ALIGNBEAM : Inference-Time Alignment Transfer via Cross-Vocabulary Logit Mixing
summary: Domain fine-tuning degrades the safety of large language models: fine-tuned specialists readily comply with harmful prompts framed in domain language. Existing inference-time defenses that mix logits from a safe anchor model require both models to share a vocabulary, which rules them out for the cross-family specialists where safety is most degraded. We present ALIGNBEAM, a training-free method that lifts this restriction by translating anchor logits into the target model's vocabulary token-by-token at each decoding step; a small LLM judge then selects the safest among K candidate continuations. No weights are changed, and the safety-utility trade-off can be tuned at deployment without retraining. Across both cross-vocabulary and same-vocabulary evaluation pairs, ALIGNBEAM substantially raises refusal on adversarial benchmarks while keeping task accuracy and inference overhead within practical bounds. The results show that safety alignment can be transferred between model families at inference time, without touching either model's weights.

AI.tldr: ALIGNBEAM是一种无需训练的推理时安全对齐方法，通过逐token翻译锚点模型logits并借助小型LLM法官选择最安全的候选续写，实现了跨模型家族（包括不同词表）的安全对齐迁移，显著提升了微调后LLM对有害提示的拒答能力。
AI.motivation: 领域微调会显著降低大语言模型的安全性，使模型易于遵从以领域语言表述的有害提示。现有基于推理时防御的方法通过混合安全锚点模型的logits来提升安全性，但要求两个模型共享同一词表，这排除了安全退化最严重的跨模型家族场景。
AI.method: ALIGNBEAM是一种无需训练的方法，在每一步解码时将锚点模型的logits逐token翻译到目标模型的词表上，生成K个候选续写序列；随后由一个小型LLM法官从中选择最安全的输出。该方法不改变任何模型权重，且安全-效用权衡可在部署时通过调整超参数实现而无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在跨词表和同词表两种评估设置下，ALIGNBEAM在对抗性安全基准上显著提升了模型的拒答率，同时将任务准确率和推理开销控制在实用范围内。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，安全对齐可以在推理时跨模型家族进行迁移，而无需修改任何模型的权重。这为在不牺牲领域任务性能的前提下提升微调后LLM的安全性提供了一种实用且灵活的解决方案。

title: Multi-View In-Cabin Monitoring System for Public Transport Vehicles
summary: We introduce a multi-view in-cabin monitoring dataset for public transportation with synchronized RGB and depth images from four inward-facing cameras and a rotating LiDAR covering the vehicle interior of a digitalized and partly automated German city bus. The dataset contains 9.136 synchronized samples with annotations and is accompanied by a calibration and pseudo-labeling pipeline that generates 3D human pose estimates and oriented 3D bounding boxes for occupants. We further provide a nuScenes-format conversion and benchmark representative multi-view 3D detection models (e.g., Lift-Splat-Shoot and BEVFusion), supporting comparative evaluation and small-scale training of multi-view in-cabin perception models. The dataset and tools are available at https://github.com/EvgenyGorelik/multiview_incabin_dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向公共交通的多视角车内监控数据集，包含来自四台朝内摄像头和一台旋转LiDAR的同步RGB-D图像与3D标注，并配套了标定、伪标签生成及nuScenes格式转换工具，支持多视角3D感知模型的评估与训练。
AI.motivation: 现有车内监控数据集大多局限于单视角或缺少3D标注，且缺乏面向公共交通场景（如城市公交车）的多模态、多视角同步数据，限制了多视角3D感知模型在车内环境中的开发与评估。
AI.method: 该数据集基于一辆数字化且部分自动化的德国城市公交车，采集了四台朝内摄像头（RGB+深度）和一台旋转LiDAR的同步数据，共计9136个样本；配套提供标定与伪标签生成管线，可生成3D人体姿态估计和面向3D包围框；同时提供nuScenes格式转换工具，并基准测试了Lift-Splat-Shoot和BEVFusion等多视角3D检测模型。
AI.result: 基准实验表明，该数据集支持多视角3D检测模型的比较评估和小规模训练，Lift-Splat-Shoot和BEVFusion等代表性模型在车内场景上展现了可比较的性能表现，数据集已公开并提供完整工具链以复现结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了公共交通车内多视角感知数据集领域的空白，通过提供标准化的数据格式和基线模型，为车内安全监控、乘客行为分析等应用奠定了基础，并推动了多视角3D感知在非驾驶场景中的研究。

title: Doc-to-Atom: Learning to Compile and Compose Memory Atoms
summary: Long input sequences are central to document understanding and multi-step reasoning in Large Language Models, yet the quadratic cost of attention makes inference both memory-intensive and slow. Context distillation mitigates this by compressing contextual information into model parameters, and recent work such as Doc-to-LoRA amortizes context distillation into a single forward pass that generates one LoRA adapter per document. However, producing a single monolithic adapter for all queries leads to irrelevant-query interference, limited compositional recall, and poor scalability to long-document reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose Doc-to-Atom (Doc2Atom), a compositional parametric memory framework that decomposes each document into semantically typed knowledge atoms. Each atom is compiled into an independent micro-LoRA adapter and a provenance retrieval key. At inference time, a lightweight query router selects and assembles only the relevant atoms into a query-specific adapter, which is then injected into a frozen base model. The entire system is trained end-to-end through a multi-objective distillation framework. Experiments on six diverse QA benchmarks demonstrate that Doc2Atom outperforms Doc-to-LoRA baselines while reducing the memory cost of document internalization.

AI.tldr: Doc2Atom提出了一种组合式参数记忆框架，将文档分解为语义类型化的知识原子，每个原子编译为独立的微LoRA适配器与溯源检索键，推理时通过轻量查询路由器组装与查询相关的适配器，在六个QA基准上超越Doc-to-LoRA并降低内部化内存开销。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文蒸馏方法如Doc-to-LoRA通过单次前向传播生成全文档的单一LoRA适配器，导致无关查询干扰、组合回忆能力有限且难以扩展至长文档推理，亟需一种能够细粒度组织记忆并实现查询感知组装的机制。
AI.method: Doc2Atom将文档分解为语义类型化知识原子，每个原子编译为独立微LoRA适配器及溯源检索键；推理时通过轻量查询路由器选择并组装相关原子形成查询特定适配器，注入冻结基座模型；整个系统通过多目标蒸馏框架端到端训练。
AI.result: 在六个多样化QA基准上的实验表明，Doc2Atom在多任务上优于Doc-to-LoRA基线，同时降低了文档内部化的内存开销。
AI.conclusion: Doc2Atom通过组合式参数记忆与查询感知组装有效缓解了单适配器方案的干扰与可扩展性问题，为LLM高效处理长序列输入提供了新范式。

title: From Prompts to Tokens: Internalizing Causal Supervision in Vision-Language Model for Multi-Image Causal Reasoning
summary: Visual causal reasoning is essential for understanding and intervening in the physical world, requiring identification of causal variables from visual inputs and reasoning over intervention effects. Despite recent progress, large vision--language models (VLMs) remain brittle at such tasks, especially for interventional and counterfactual queries over multi-image inputs. Most existing explorations inject causal knowledge via textual prompts, leaving causal mechanisms external to model execution and limiting reliable control during inference. To address this problem, we propose BridgeVLM, which internalizes visual causal reasoning by inducing a causal graph from multi-image inputs and converting it into structured Causal Tokens executed by RAMP layers injected into the LLM decoder for causal message passing. We further introduce a unified training interface M3S for fine-grained causal supervision from different granularities (local/global level). BridgeVLM achieves 54.4% accuracy on intervention tasks on CausalVLBench (vs. 33.2% with prompt-level supervision), improves results on Causal3D from 43.6% to 49.0%, and substantially improves causal structure learning on CausalVLBench ($F_1$: 33.4% $\rightarrow$ 75.1%).

AI.tldr: BridgeVLM 提出通过因果令牌（Causal Tokens）和 RAMP 层将因果图内化到视觉语言模型的解码过程中，从而在无需外部提示的情况下实现多图像输入的因果推理，在干预任务和因果结构学习上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型在视觉因果推理任务中表现脆弱，尤其在面对多图像输入的干预和反事实查询时，多数方法仅通过文本提示注入因果知识，导致因果机制外置于模型执行流程之外，无法在推理阶段进行可靠控制。
AI.method: BridgeVLM 从多图像输入中诱导因果图，并将其转化为结构化的因果令牌（Causal Tokens），通过注入到 LLM 解码器中的 RAMP 层执行因果消息传递，从而实现因果推理的内化；同时提出统一训练接口 M3S，支持不同粒度（局部/全局）的细粒度因果监督。
AI.result: 在 CausalVLBench 的干预任务上，BridgeVLM 达到 54.4% 准确率（提示级监督仅 33.2%）；在 Causal3D 上从 43.6% 提升至 49.0%；在 CausalVLBench 上的因果结构学习 F1 从 33.4% 大幅提升至 75.1%。
AI.conclusion: 将因果图结构内化为模型执行过程中的令牌级表示，能够显著提升视觉语言模型在因果推理任务上的表现与可控性，为构建具备可靠视觉因果推理能力的多模态系统提供了有效路径。

title: TextHOI-3D: Text-to-3D Hand-Object Interaction via Discrete Multi-View Generation and Joint Mesh Optimization
summary: Text-conditioned 3D generation has progressed rapidly for images and isolated objects, but producing a hand-object mesh remains challenging: the output must preserve language semantics, cross-view consistency, object geometry, articulated hand shape, and physically plausible contact. We present TextHOI-3D, a staged framework that uses generated multi-view observations as an explicit interface between text-conditioned visual generation and geometry-aware hand-object recovery. TextHOI-3D learns a compact VQ token space for fixed-camera hand-object observations, predicts multi-view visual tokens from text with a CLIP-conditioned visual autoregressive model, and recovers a unified hand-object mesh through prior initialization, multi-view joint optimization, and anti-penetration refinement. The design separates semantic generation from geometric recovery while keeping both stages connected by a discrete multi-view representation. On HO3D-derived evaluations, the multi-view setting reduces object CD from 17.26 mm to 4.92 mm and penetration volume from 5.3721 cm^3 to 0.2193 cm^3 compared with a single-view counterpart, while improving hand errors and surface F-scores. These results support multi-view visual tokens as an effective intermediate representation for text-driven 3D hand-object mesh creation.

AI.tldr: TextHOI-3D提出了一种分阶段框架，利用生成的多视角观察作为文本条件视觉生成与几何感知手-物网格重建之间的显式接口，通过VQ token空间、CLIP条件视觉自回归模型和多视角联合优化，显著提升了文本驱动3D手-物交互网格生成的质量与物理合理性。
AI.motivation: 文本条件3D生成在图像和孤立物体方面取得了显著进展，但生成手-物交互网格仍面临挑战：输出必须同时保持语言语义、跨视角一致性、物体几何、关节手部形状以及物理合理的接触。现有方法难以同时满足这些约束。
AI.method: TextHOI-3D采用分阶段框架：首先为固定相机视角的手-物观察学习一个紧凑的VQ token空间；然后利用CLIP条件视觉自回归模型从文本预测多视角视觉token；最后通过先验初始化、多视角联合优化和抗穿透精炼恢复统一的手-物网格。该设计将语义生成与几何重建分离，同时通过离散多视角表示连接两个阶段。
AI.result: 在HO3D派生数据集上的评估表明，相比单视角方法，多视角设置将物体倒角距离从17.26 mm降至4.92 mm，穿透体积从5.3721 cm³降至0.2193 cm³，同时改善了手部误差和表面F-score。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果支持多视角视觉token作为文本驱动3D手-物网格创建的有效中间表示，该框架通过分离语义生成与几何重建实现了性能的显著提升。

title: OpenMedReason: Scientific Reasoning Supervision for Medical Vision-Language Models
comment: 42 pages, 9 figures, 24 tables. Dataset and code: https://huggingface.co/datasets/neginb/OpenMedReason
summary: High-stakes clinical use of large vision-language models (LVLMs) requires reasoning that is grounded in visual evidence and clinical knowledge, not just correct final answers. We introduce OpenMedReason, a large-scale, open multimodal medical reasoning corpus comprising approximately 450K image-question-answer instances whose reasoning traces are primarily derived from curated biomedical, human-authored scientific articles. OpenMedReason provides high-fidelity supervision beyond synthetic chains of thought, covering diverse medical domain vision modalities such as radiological scans, microscopic images, visible light photographs, charts, and others. We complement it with OpenMedReason-Bench, a held-out benchmark that allows fine-grained evaluation of LVLMs along three complementary axes of capability, including perception, medical knowledge, and rationale, enabling diagnostic evaluation beyond final-answer accuracy. OpenMedReason is a rich training resource that exhibits its effectiveness in both supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement-based alignment. Training with OpenMedReason yields a 20% average improvement in VQA accuracy over the base model and achieves performance within 4.2% of the strongest comparable-scale medical LVLMs. Fine-grained performance analysis confirms that the gains are not concentrated in any single axis: OpenMedReason improves perception, medical knowledge, and rationale jointly, and its reasoning traces are preferred over those of the base model in 86.1% of pairwise comparisons. We release the code and dataset at huggingface.co/datasets/neginb/OpenMedReason.

AI.tldr: OpenMedReason 是一个包含约45万条多模态医学推理样本的大规模开源语料库及其配套基准测试集，能够有效提升大型视觉语言模型在临床医学场景中的感知能力、医学知识与推理能力，并实现约20%的VQA准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在临床高风险医学应用中的推理过程往往缺乏对视觉证据和临床知识的充分依赖，仅追求最终答案的正确性；同时，缺乏大规模、高质量、具有真实推理轨迹（而非合成思维链）的开源多模态医学推理训练资源，导致模型的诊断能力难以细粒度评估和有效提升。
AI.method: 论文构建了 OpenMedReason 语料库，包含约45万对图像-问题-答案实例，推理轨迹主要来源于人工撰写的生物医学科学文献而非合成数据，覆盖放射学扫描、显微图像、可见光照片、图表等多种医学视觉模态；同时设计 OpenMedReason-Bench 基准测试，沿感知能力、医学知识、推理过程三个互补维度对LVLMs进行细粒度诊断评估；该语料可同时用于监督微调（SFT）和基于强化学习的对齐训练。
AI.result: 基于 OpenMedReason 进行训练后，模型在VQA准确率上相比基模型平均提升20%，与最强可比规模医学LVLMs的差距缩小至4.2%以内；细粒度分析表明，感知、医学知识和推理三个维度均获得联合改进，且模型生成的推理轨迹在86.1%的成对比较中优于基模型。
AI.conclusion: OpenMedReason 作为高质量、多样化的开源多模态医学推理训练资源，在监督微调和强化对齐中均表现出有效性，能够协同提升LVLMs在医学视觉推理中的感知、知识与推理能力，并为模型的诊断性评估提供了新的基准框架；代码与数据已开源。

title: Scene-Adaptive Nonlinear Tone Curves for Pseudo Ground-Truth Generation in Low-Light 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Low-light novel view synthesis is challenging because dark multi-view images contain noise, weak structural detail, and compressed dynamic range. Recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods address these challenges by generating pseudo ground-truth (pseudo-GT) images as supervision targets when paired normal-light references are unavailable. Existing pseudo-GT methods apply a uniform linear gain to all pixels, which clips bright regions while providing insufficient enhancement in dark regions, limiting reconstruction quality. We observe that nonlinear tone mappings, long established in 2D low-light enhancement, have not been explored for pseudo-GT generation in 3D reconstruction. Accordingly, we propose a scene-adaptive nonlinear tone-curve framework that replaces linear pseudo-GT with nonlinear alternatives. The framework introduces percentile-based normalisation for scene-agnostic curve application, a scene-adaptive offset for automatic black-level adjustment, and two complementary curves: Adaptive SoftExp (ASE), a bounded exponential curve, and Adaptive Poly3 (AP3), a data-driven cubic polynomial. The module changes only the pseudo-GT computation and leaves the 3DGS backbone unchanged. Experiments on three benchmarks covering 21 scenes show that both curves consistently outperform the linear baseline with PSNR improvements up to +4.34 dB on LOM and +3.25 dB on RealX3D. Both curves achieve similar performance despite their different mathematical forms, suggesting the improvement is curve-agnostic. Code is available at https://github.com/lvmingzhe/adaptiveToneCurve

AI.tldr: 提出一种场景自适应非线性色调曲线框架，替代线性伪GT用于低光照新视角合成中的3DGS监督，在无参考正常光照图像条件下显著提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有低光照3DGS方法在缺乏正常光照参考图像时，使用统一的线性增益生成伪GT图像进行监督，但线性增益会导致亮部过曝而暗部增强不足，限制了重建质量；同时，非线性色调映射在2D低光增强中已被广泛验证有效，却未被引入3D重建中的伪GT生成过程。
AI.method: 提出场景自适应非线性色调曲线框架，包含基于百分位数的归一化以实现场景无关的曲线应用、场景自适应偏移用于自动黑电平调整，以及两条互补曲线：Adaptive SoftExp（ASE，有界指数曲线）和Adaptive Poly3（AP3，数据驱动的三次多项式）。该模块仅替换伪GT计算方式，不改变3DGS骨干网络结构。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集21个场景上的实验表明，两条曲线均一致优于线性基线，在LOM数据集上PSNR提升最高达+4.34 dB，在RealX3D上提升+3.25 dB。两条曲线虽数学形式不同但性能相近，表明提升效果与曲线具体形式无关。
AI.conclusion: 非线性色调曲线可有效替代线性增益用于低光照3DGS的伪GT生成，且场景自适应的非线性映射是提升重建质量的关键，而非曲线的具体数学形式；该框架简单即插即用，有潜力推广至其他依赖伪GT的3D重建任务。

title: SG2Loc: Sequential Visual Localization on 3D Scene Graphs
comment: The code will be available at https://github.com/DmblnNicole/sg2loc
summary: Visual localization in complex indoor environments remains a critical challenge for robotics and AR applications. Sequential localization, where pose estimates are refined over time, is important for autonomous agents. However, traditional methods often require storing extensive image databases or point clouds, leading to significant overhead. This paper introduces a novel, lightweight approach to sequential visual localization using 3D scene graphs. Our method represents the environment with a compact scene graph, where nodes represent objects (with coarse meshes) and edges encode spatial relationships. For each image in the localization phase, we extract per-patch semantic features, predicting object identities. Localization is performed within a particle filter framework. Each particle, representing a camera pose, projects the coarse object meshes from the scene graph into the image, assigning object identities to patches based on visibility. The similarity of the per-patch features, in the input image, and object features from the scene graph determines the weight of a particle. Subsequent images are incorporated sequentially, refining the pose estimate. By leveraging a compact scene graph and efficient semantic matching, our method significantly reduces storage while maintaining performance on real-world datasets. The code will be available at https://github.com/DmblnNicole/sg2loc.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D场景图的轻量级顺序视觉定位方法，通过紧凑的场景图表示环境（节点为带粗网格的物体，边编码空间关系），结合粒子滤波器和逐块语义特征匹配，显著降低了存储开销，同时在真实数据集上保持了竞争力的定位性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉定位方法在复杂室内环境中常需存储大量图像数据库或点云，导致存储开销过大，难以满足自主智能体对轻量级、可顺序优化的定位需求，现有方法在紧凑性与定位精度之间缺乏有效平衡。
AI.method: 该方法采用3D场景图作为环境表示，节点为含粗网格的物体，边编码物体间的空间关系；定位阶段对每帧图像提取逐块语义特征并预测物体身份，在粒子滤波器框架下，每个粒子（表示相机位姿）将场景图中物体粗网格投影至图像并基于可见性分配物体身份，通过输入图像逐块特征与场景图物体特征的相似度计算粒子权重，多帧图像顺序融合以逐步精化位姿估计。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上的实验表明，该方法相较于需要大量图像数据库或点云的传统方法，显著降低了存储需求，同时保持了相当的定位性能（具体指标待论文完整公开）。代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了利用紧凑3D场景图进行顺序视觉定位的可行性，通过语义级匹配与粒子滤波器的结合，在存储效率与定位精度之间实现了有效折中；该工作为资源受限平台（如机器人、AR设备）上的长期定位提供了一种轻量级新范式。

title: Image Quality Assessment of Identity Cards Using Measures from Open Face Image Quality
comment: Presented on IWBF 2026 (14th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics)
summary: This paper addresses the challenge of assessing image quality in ID cards in remote verification systems by applying capture-related quality measures from the Open Face Image Quality (OFIQ) standard to ID card images. Our preprocessing pipeline includes corner detection, perspective normalization, and comprehensive foreground masking to ensure accurate and unbiased quality measure computation. We evaluate the effectiveness of these measures by analyzing their correlation with the performance of three presentation attack detection (PAD) algorithms across four diverse ID card datasets, where two datasets contain bona fide, i.e. pristine, images and two contain printed mock ID cards. Our results suggest that quality assessment based on some OFIQ measures can significantly improve PAD performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将OFIQ标准中的采集相关质量度量应用于身份证图像，通过预处理流水线（角点检测、透视归一化、前景掩膜）实现质量评估，实验表明部分OFIQ度量与展示攻击检测（PAD）算法性能显著相关，可有效提升身份证远程验证系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 远程身份验证系统中身份证图像质量参差不齐，现有图像质量评估方法未专门针对身份证图像特性优化，且缺乏与展示攻击检测（PAD）性能之间关联的系统研究，亟需一种适用于身份证场景的质量度量标准以提升验证系统的鲁棒性和安全性。
AI.method: 基于OFIQ标准中的采集相关质量度量，设计预处理流水线：首先进行角点检测以定位身份证边界，然后实施透视归一化矫正几何畸变，最后通过前景掩膜消除背景干扰，确保质量度量计算的准确性与无偏性。采用四个不同身份证数据集（两个含真实图像、两个含打印仿冒卡）评估质量度量与三种PAD算法性能的相关性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，部分OFIQ质量度量与PAD算法性能之间存在显著相关性，即在身份证图像质量较高的条件下，PAD算法的检测能力得到明显提升，两个打印仿冒卡数据集上的实验结果进一步验证了这一发现。
AI.conclusion: 基于OFIQ标准的图像质量评估能够有效改善身份证场景下的展示攻击检测性能，为远程身份验证系统提供了实用的质量筛选依据，未来可进一步探索更多OFIQ度量与不同攻击类型的关联机制。

title: Task-Aligned Stability Analysis of Vision-Language Models for Autonomous Driving Hazard Detection
comment: 8 pages (5 main body + 3 references / appendices). ICML 2026 Workshop on Combining Theory and Benchmarks (CTB)
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used for scene understanding in autonomous driving, but robustness analysis often relies on task-agnostic embedding stability alone. We study whether corruption-induced embedding drift predicts changes in a task-aligned hazard score derived from CLIP image-text similarities. Using controlled corruptions on BDD100K road scenes, we compare embedding drift against margin drift, defined as the change in hazard score under perturbation. The relationship is highly corruption-dependent: some families exhibit strong coupling between representation drift and decision drift, while others induce hazardous decision instability despite relatively modest embedding change. Furthermore, corruption families differ in failure direction: most suppress hazard detections via false negatives, while occlusion instead triggers false alarms, suggesting that benchmark design should account for asymmetric failure modes, not just overall instability rates. These results suggest that robustness benchmarks should include task-aligned stability measures in addition to embedding-level perturbation statistics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉语言模型在自动驾驶场景理解中嵌入漂移与任务对齐的决策漂移之间的关系，发现不同腐败类型下二者耦合程度存在显著差异，且腐败方向会导致不对称的失效模式（漏报 vs 误报），表明鲁棒性基准应纳入任务对齐的稳定性指标。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在自动驾驶场景中的鲁棒性分析通常仅依赖任务无关的嵌入稳定性（embedding stability），但嵌入层面的扰动是否真正反映任务层面的决策变化尚不清楚，本文旨在填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 基于BDD100K道路场景数据，对图像施加受控腐败（corruptions），利用CLIP的图像-文本相似度计算任务对齐的危险评分（hazard score），比较嵌入漂移（embedding drift）与边缘漂移（margin drift，即危险评分在扰动下的变化）之间的关系。
AI.result: 嵌入漂移与决策漂移之间的关系高度依赖于腐败类型：部分腐败族表现出强耦合，而另一些则在嵌入变化相对较小的情况下引发危险的决策不稳定性；此外，大多数腐败通过假阴性抑制危险检测，而遮挡（occlusion）反而触发误报，显示出不对称的失效模式。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒性基准设计不应仅依赖嵌入层面的扰动统计，还应纳入任务对齐的稳定性指标，以全面评估模型在实际场景中的可靠行为，特别是应对不对称失效模式的能力。

title: From Content to Knowledge: Lightning Fast Long-Video Understanding with Neural Knowledge Representations
summary: We propose a new paradigm for long video understanding by treating a long video as a Neural Knowledge Representation (NKR). NKR represents video contents neither as a stream of tokens nor pre-organized databases, but as an individual small portion of network weights attached to the VLM backbone. The NKR weights are optimized to encapsulate the video's semantic content via a novel Agentic Knowledge Distillation (AKD) process, where an agent automatically synthesizes dense descriptions and question-answer pairs to distill the video's knowledge into the NKR. While AKD serves as a comprehensive, one-time encoding phase, the resulting NKR transforms the video into a portable, reusable asset. At inference, the lightweight NKR is mounted onto a frozen Vision-Language Model (VLM), enabling direct, query-based understanding without reloading or re-encoding the original video. This approach decouples video length from inference cost, offering high amortized efficiency for multi-turn video understanding. Experiments on the LVBench benchmark show our method achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art approaches while reducing end-to-end latency by over two orders of magnitude, opening new possibilities for interactive long-video understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出将长视频编码为神经知识表征（NKR）的新型范式，通过代理知识蒸馏（AKD）将视频语义压缩进VLM骨干网络的轻量级权重中，在LVBench上达到SOTA性能的同时将端到端延迟降低两个数量级。
AI.motivation: 现有长视频理解方法要么将视频处理为连续token流导致推理成本随视频长度线性增长，要么依赖预组织数据库缺乏灵活性，难以同时实现高效编码和低成本多轮交互推理。
AI.method: 提出神经知识表征（NKR）框架，将长视频语义内容编码为一小部分附加在VLM骨干网络上的网络权重；采用代理知识蒸馏（AKD）过程，由一个智能体自动合成密集描述和问答对，将视频知识蒸馏到NKR中；推理时将轻量级NKR挂载到冻结的VLM上，直接支持基于查询的理解而无需重新加载或重新编码原始视频。
AI.result: 在LVBench基准上，该方法达到了与现有最先进方法可比的性能，同时将端到端延迟降低了两个数量级以上，实现了视频长度与推理成本的解耦。
AI.conclusion: NKR范式通过将视频知识固化到网络权重中，从根本上解耦了视频长度与推理开销，为交互式长视频理解提供了高摊销效率的新路径；AKD作为一次性编码阶段，使得NKR成为可移植、可重用的视频资产。

title: Metadata-Aware Multi-Prompt Reasoning for Zero-Shot Accident Understanding
comment: Accepted at the AUTOPILOT Workshop, CVPR 2026 (non-archival). Workshop Paper ID 15
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of zero-shot understanding of accidents from surveillance videos by identifying when an impact event occurs, what type of impact it is, and where in the frame it occurs using natural language. We propose a three-stage pipeline that decomposes the accident understanding into when, what, and where. The first stage extracts a short temporal window around the impact using vision-language similarity. In the second stage, we perform metadata-driven multi-prompt reasoning with five complementary views (baseline, motion, geometry, contrast, and tiebreaker) and resolve disagreement via an entropy-gated pairwise adjudicator. Finally, we localize the impact of an open-vocabulary detector queried on the predicted accident type and scene layout, and aggregate detections across keyframes using a score-weighted centroid. Our pipeline achieves a substantial improvement in the harmonic-mean score over a centre-of-frame baseline on the zero-shot ACCIDENT @ CVPR benchmark. We show that decomposing zero-shot video understanding into temporal localization, semantic classification, and spatial grounding enable more reliable reasoning with vision-language models than direct prompting alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个三阶段零样本事故理解流水线，通过视觉-语言相似性定位时间窗口、多视角元数据驱动推理进行语义分类、以及开放词汇目标检测进行空间定位，在零样本ACCIDENT基准上显著提升了调和平均得分。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在零样本场景下难以从监控视频中全面理解事故（何时、何类、何处），直接使用视觉-语言模型进行整体提示推理效果不佳，缺乏对事故时间定位、语义分类和空间接地能力的系统解耦与协同。
AI.method: 提出三阶段流水线：第一阶段利用视觉-语言相似性提取冲击事件周围的短时间窗口；第二阶段通过元数据驱动的多提示推理，融合基线、运动、几何、对比和决胜五种互补视角，并使用熵门控成对裁决器解决视角间分歧；第三阶段基于预测的事故类型和场景布局，使用开放词汇检测器定位冲击区域，并通过得分加权质心在关键帧间聚合检测结果。
AI.result: 在零样本ACCIDENT @ CVPR基准上，所提流水线的调和平均分数相较于中心帧基线取得了显著提升，验证了将零样本视频理解分解为时间定位、语义分类和空间接地三个子任务的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将零样本视频理解显式分解为时间定位、语义分类和空间接地三个子任务，比直接使用视觉-语言模型进行整体提示推理能够实现更可靠的推理能力，为复杂视频事件理解提供了一种结构化分解范式。

title: Corpus Augmentation for Sign Language Translation via LLM-Guided Video Stitching
summary: Sign language translation (SLT) converts sign language video into spoken language text and holds significant promise for improving accessibility and enabling communication between signing and non-signing communities. While large weakly-aligned datasets have enabled pre-training at scale and gloss-free methods have reduced reliance on expert annotation, high-quality parallel sign video-text pairs for fine-tuning remain scarce, limiting generalisation on long-tail vocabulary and unseen constructions. We propose a corpus augmentation approach that requires no additional human annotation, external sign-language video corpora, or generative video models, relying only on the existing gloss-annotated training corpus and an LLM for sentence generation: per-gloss clips are extracted from training videos via CTC forced-alignment, novel gloss-sentence pairs are generated by a corpus-anchored LLM, and synthetic sequences are assembled through random sentence sampling and clip assignment. The resulting synthetic RGB video-text pairs are architecture-agnostic at the downstream training stage and can be consumed directly by RGB-based SLT models, or converted into pose or feature representations by pipelines that derive such inputs from video. Sincan et al. re-evaluated five recent gloss-free methods under strictly identical conditions; the largest verified gain over the GFSLT-VLP baseline was only 0.98 BLEU-4. Our augmentation, applied within the same framework, achieves +2.92 BLEU-4 without any change to architecture or training protocol. We further identify that synthetic data harms vision-language pretraining despite improving its objectives, and that optimising clip transitions for visual smoothness is counter-productive under L2-based criteria; we propose that abrupt boundaries may act as a form of implicit regularisation. Code is available at https://github.com/robizso/slt-datagen.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于LLM的语料库增强方法，无需额外人工标注或外部数据，通过CTC强制对齐提取逐词片段并用LLM生成新句子来构造合成RGB视频-文本对，在GFSLT-VLP基线上无需修改架构即可提升+2.92 BLEU-4，同时发现合成数据会损害视觉-语言预训练但能改善其目标函数，且 abrupt 片段边界可作为隐式正则化。
AI.motivation: 手语翻译（SLT）领域面临高质量平行手语视频-文本数据稀缺的问题，这限制了模型在长尾词汇和未见构式上的泛化能力。现有方法依赖大规模弱对齐数据集进行预训练或无标注方法减少专家标注，但微调阶段仍缺乏足够的高质量平行数据。
AI.method: 提出一种无需额外人工标注、外部手语视频语料库或生成式视频模型的语料库增强方法：首先通过CTC强制对齐从训练视频中提取每个手语词对应的视频片段，然后利用以现有语料库为锚定条件的LLM生成新的手势词-句子对，最后通过随机句子采样和片段分配组装合成序列，生成RGB视频-文本对。该合成数据可直接被RGB-based SLT模型使用，也可转换为姿态或特征表示。
AI.result: 在严格相同的条件下重新评估了五种近期无标注方法，发现最大验证提升仅为0.98 BLEU-4；而所提增强方法在GFSLT-VLP基线上无需改变架构或训练协议即可实现+2.92 BLEU-4的提升。进一步发现合成数据会损害视觉-语言预训练尽管能改善其目标函数，且基于L2准则优化片段间视觉平滑度是反效果的，abrupt边界可作为一种隐式正则化。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明所提语料库增强方法能有效缓解平行数据稀缺问题并显著提升SLT性能，同时揭示合成数据在预训练阶段存在负面作用以及视觉平滑度并非最优设计目标，abrupt片段边界具有隐式正则化效果，为后续合成数据在SLT中的应用提供了重要设计原则。

title: MSUE: Multi-Modal Soccer Understanding Expert
summary: This paper presents our solution to the 2026 SoccerNet VQA Challenge. We first develop a cost-effective data synthesis pipeline driven by a Vision-Language Model (VLM), which systematically restructures raw domain data into diverse VQA samples, including concise answers and long-form responses. Second, we propose MSUE, a multi-expert question answering architecture that employs a Large Language Model (LLM) to dynamically dispatch questions to text, image, and video experts. These experts are instantiated as a strong text baseline Gemini3-Flash, a fine-tuned Qwen3-VL, and an external knowledge base, respectively, working collaboratively to enhance VQA performance. MSUE achieves an accuracy of \textbf{0.95} on the challenge benchmark, securing third place in the leaderboard.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于VLM的低成本数据合成管道MSUE，以及一个多专家问答架构，在2026 SoccerNet VQA挑战赛中以0.95的准确率获得第三名。
AI.motivation: 针对体育视频领域VQA任务中高质量训练数据稀缺、单一模型难以同时处理文本、图像和视频多模态信息的问题，本文旨在构建一种低成本、高效的数据合成方法以及多专家协同的问答架构以提升VQA性能。
AI.method: 首先开发了一个由VLM驱动的低成本数据合成管道，系统地将原始领域数据重构为多样化的VQA样本。其次提出了MSUE多专家问答架构，使用LLM动态地将问题分发给文本专家（Gemini3-Flash）、图像专家（微调后的Qwen3-VL）和视频专家（外部知识库），三个专家协作完成问答任务。
AI.result: 在2026 SoccerNet VQA挑战赛基准上，MSUE架构取得了0.95的准确率，在排行榜上位列第三。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了利用VLM进行低成本数据合成以及LLM驱动的多专家分发策略能够有效提升体育领域VQA性能，为数据稀缺场景下的多模态问答提供了可行的技术路径。

title: FitVTON: Fit-aware Virtual Try-On via Body-Garment Size Control
summary: While diffusion-based virtual try-on has achieved impressive visual realism, most methods treat the task as 2D inpainting, prioritizing texture preservation over physical plausibility. Consequently, they often produce plausible-looking images that fail to reflect authentic garment fit across diverse body shapes. We present FitVTON, a Fit-aware virtual try-on model on different bodies in the wild. FitVTON encodes garment-body size through structured text prompts, and learn from simulated try-on triplets from parameterized garment model. To improve the fitting effects over garment silhouettes, we introduce two auxiliary head to predict the masks for both the garment and the exposed body. We further introduce a texture rectification stage to improve realistic appearance from simulated data. To evaluate the fitting fidelity, we curate a real-world dataset, FittingEffect3K, combining VLM-based scoring protocol. Both subjective and quantitive experiments show that FitVTON demonstrate authentic fitting fidelity, with significant sizing accuracy and shape preservation over state-of-the-art methods while maintaining competitive image quality. Project Page: https://zenoning.github.io/FitVTON/.

AI.tldr: FitVTON 提出了一种考虑体型适配的虚拟试穿模型，通过结构化的文本提示编码服装-身体尺寸关系，利用参数化服装模型生成的模拟三元组进行训练，并引入辅助头部预测服装与裸露身体区域掩膜以改善轮廓贴合效果，同时设计纹理修复阶段提升模拟数据的真实感；在自建真实数据集 FittingEffect3K 上结合 VLM 评估协议，实验表明该方法在尺寸准确性和形状保持方面显著优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的虚拟试穿方法大多将任务视为二维图像修补问题，优先保证纹理保留而非物理合理性，导致生成的图像虽然视觉逼真却无法反映服装在不同体型上的真实贴合效果；现有方法缺乏对服装-身体尺寸关系的显式建模，难以实现跨体型的适配性试穿。
AI.method: FitVTON 通过结构化的文本提示编码服装与身体之间的尺寸关系，从参数化服装模型生成的模拟试穿三元组中学习拟合特征；引入两个辅助头部分别预测服装掩膜和裸露身体掩膜以优化服装轮廓贴合效果；设计纹理修复阶段对模拟数据进行真实感增强，弥合模拟与真实数据间的域差距；为评估拟合保真度，构建真实世界数据集 FittingEffect3K 并设计基于 VLM 的评分协议。
AI.result: 主观与定量实验表明，FitVTON 在尺寸准确性和形状保持方面显著优于现有最先进方法，同时保持具有竞争力的图像质量；在自建 FittingEffect3K 数据集上的评估证明了该方法在跨体型场景下的真实拟合保真度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了将物理贴合感知引入虚拟试穿的重要性，验证了通过结构化文本编码尺寸关系、利用模拟数据训练结合纹理修复的策略可以有效提升跨体型试穿的适配性；为虚拟试穿领域从视觉逼真向物理合理演进提供了可行的技术路径和评估基准。

title: World Model Self-Distillation: Training World Models to Solve General Tasks
summary: Pretrained video generators are promising visual world models that exhibit emergent task-solving abilities; however, their reliance on detailed textual descriptions limits their direct use for planning and decision-making. Existing approaches either outsource this reasoning to language or vision-language models, or rely on supervised fine-tuning with paired task-execution videos, which are costly to collect and difficult to scale. We propose a scalable framework that elicits task-solving ability in such models by combining self-distillation with reinforcement learning. Given an unlabeled scene image, a vision-language model generates a candidate task and a detailed step-by-step solution. The solution conditions a pretrained video diffusion model, the Demonstrator; we distill its behavior into an Executor conditioned only on the image and a short task prompt. This transfers execution knowledge from caption-guided generation to instruction-conditioned task solving without curated task-video supervision. We further improve the Executor with reinforcement learning from VLM feedback, exploiting the asymmetry between judging whether a sampled video satisfies a task and generating the solution. Experiments on our proposed WorldTasks-Benchmark and the DreamGen robotics benchmark show that the Executor surpasses the Demonstrator under our VLM-based evaluation protocol and transfers competitively to robotic tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合自蒸馏与强化学习的可扩展框架，使预训练视频生成模型具备任务求解能力，无需依赖详细的文本描述或标注的任务执行视频，在WorldTasks-Benchmark和DreamGen机器人基准上超越了基于字幕引导的基线模型。
AI.motivation: 预训练视频生成模型虽具有涌现的任务求解能力，但其依赖详细的文本描述才能生成视频，限制了其在规划和决策中的直接使用；现有方法要么将推理外包给语言模型或视觉语言模型，要么依赖昂贵的监督微调（需要配对的任务执行视频），难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出一个两阶段可扩展框架：首先，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）从未标注场景图像生成候选任务及详细的逐步解决方案；其次，将该解决方案作为条件输入预训练视频扩散模型（Demonstrator），通过自蒸馏将其行为迁移到一个仅以图像和简短任务提示为条件的Executor中；最后，利用来自VLM反馈的强化学习进一步优化Executor，利用VLM在判断视频是否满足任务与生成解决方案之间的不对称性。
AI.result: 在提出的WorldTasks-Benchmark和DreamGen机器人基准上，Executor在基于VLM的评估协议下超越了Demonstrator，并在机器人任务迁移中表现出竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，通过自蒸馏将字幕引导的视频生成知识迁移到指令条件化的任务求解，再结合基于VLM反馈的强化学习优化，可以在无需人工标注任务视频的前提下有效激发预训练视频生成模型的规划与决策能力，为视频世界模型在任务求解和机器人领域的应用提供了可扩展的新范式。

title: Adapting Prithvi-EO for Fallow Detection for Food-Water Nexus: ViT-Adapter Necks and Parameter-Efficient Backbone tuning of Geospatial Foundation Model
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. Preprint. Submitted to ACM SIGSPATIAL 2026
summary: Understanding spatial distribution of fallow land is important for optimizing the food-water (FW) nexus, given fallowing's role in crop rotation and water conservation. Fallow is a low accuracy class in USDA Cropland Data Layer (CDL). Geospatial foundation model (GFM), Prithvi-EO has shown strong transferability across computer vision tasks. However, its Vision Transformer (ViT) backbone produces features at a single spatial scale that are ill-suited for the multi-scale features required by object detection heads. Existing approaches synthesise multi-scale pyramids through scaling of single stride tokens, sacrificing spatial heterogeneity, and full backbone fine-tuning is computationally prohibitive for GFMs. We evaluate a fallow detection pipeline combining two parameter-efficient fine tuning (PEFT) schemes: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and a hybrid PEFT, with three neck designs: pseudo multi-scale, Lite ViT-Adapter, and Full ViT-Adapter. Our best configuration, Lite ViT-Adapter with a one-stage head, achieves a mAP@50 of 0.9479 with the Diou loss, suggesting the effectiveness of center-aware localization for irregular fallow field detection. ViT-Adapter free one-stage detection under LoRA improves the adapter-free anchor-based approach by 6.42%, and the best configuration improves baseline adapter-free anchor-based approach by 25.70%. These results demonstrate that lightweight spatial prior fusion and selective backbone unfreezing enable Prithvi-EO to capture local fallow patterns more effectively, outperforming approaches that rely on reshaped single-stride ViT tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合LoRA与混合PEFT微调策略及ViT-Adapter颈部设计的休耕地检测流水线，使Prithvi-EO地基模型在CDL数据上达到mAP@50为0.9479的检测性能，较无适配器的基线方法提升25.70%，验证了轻量级空间先验融合与选择性骨干网络解冻对捕获局部休耕模式的有效性。
AI.motivation: 休耕地的空间分布信息对优化粮食-水资源关系至关重要，但休耕地是美国农业部CDL数据中的低精度类别；现有基于Prithvi-EO等GFM的方法因ViT骨干仅产生单尺度特征而难以适配目标检测头所需的多尺度特征，且现有通过缩放单步长token构建伪多尺度金字塔的方式损失了空间异质性，而全骨干网络微调的计算成本过高。
AI.method: 本文评估了一个结合两种参数高效微调方案（LoRA和混合PEFT）与三种颈部设计（伪多尺度、Lite ViT-Adapter、Full ViT-Adapter）的休耕地检测流水线；最佳配置采用Lite ViT-Adapter配合单阶段检测头，并使用Diou损失函数进行中心感知定位。
AI.result: 最佳配置Lite ViT-Adapter结合单阶段检测头在Diou损失下达到mAP@50为0.9479；采用LoRA的ViT-Adapter无适配器单阶段检测相比无适配器的锚点基方法提升6.42%，最佳配置相比基线无适配器锚点基方法提升25.70%。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级空间先验融合与选择性骨干网络解冻能够使Prithvi-EO更有效地捕获不规则休耕田块的局部模式，优于依赖重构单步长ViT token的方法，表明中心感知定位对不规则休耕地检测的有效性。

title: Beyond Dark Knowledge: Mixup-Based Distillation for Reliable Predictions
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) and mixup have proven effective at inducing smoothness in class boundaries; KD captures inherent class relationships in probability distributions, and mixup enforces them through convex combinations of inputs. Their interaction, however, remains poorly understood, particularly when mixup is applied only during student training. In this setting, the teacher is queried on inputs drawn from a vicinal distribution it never saw during training, a controlled mismatch whose effect on knowledge transfer has not been characterised. We show that this mismatch causes the teacher's supervisory signal to be dominated by distributional confusion rather than inter-class structure. Despite it, the student does not merely imitate the teacher: it independently acquires greater linearity in the vicinal region, a structural property that the teacher lacks, and goes beyond dark-knowledge transfer. KD with mixup consistently improves student accuracy and reduces overconfidence by an order of magnitude relative to the baseline, across CIFAR and ImageNet with varying-capacity teachers. Crucially, calibration propagates from teacher to student independently of accuracy transfer, and temperature scaling governs a measurable accuracy-calibration trade-off that becomes more pronounced under vicinal training. These results reframe mixup distillation not as a degraded version of standard KD, but as a richer transfer channel that simultaneously shapes discriminative performance, uncertainty estimation, and representational geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示知识蒸馏与mixup结合使用时，教师模型在vicinal分布上的预测主导信号是分布混淆而非类别关系，但学生不仅不模仿教师，反而独立习得教师所缺乏的线性结构，从而将mixup蒸馏重新定义为一种超越暗知识迁移的丰富传输通道，同时塑造判别性能、不确定性估计和表征几何。
AI.motivation: 知识蒸馏和mixup各自能有效平滑类别边界，但两者在mixup仅用于学生训练时的相互作用机制尚不清楚——此时教师被查询的输入来自其训练时从未见过的邻域分布，这种受控不匹配对知识迁移的影响未得到系统刻画。
AI.method: 论文系统分析了mixup在蒸馏中的角色：仅在学生训练时应用mixup，教师对vicinal分布样本提供软标签监督；通过实验对比不同容量教师（CIFAR和ImageNet）下的学生准确率、置信度校准和表征几何特性，并考察温度缩放对准确率-校准权衡的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，教师对vicinal样本的监督信号以分布混淆（distributional confusion）而非类别间结构为主导；但学生并未简单模仿教师，而是独立获得了教师所缺乏的vicinal区域线性性；KD与mixup结合一致提升了学生准确率，并将过度自信降低一个数量级；校准传播独立于准确率传播，温度缩放调控的准确率-校准权衡在vicinal训练下更为显著。
AI.conclusion: mixup蒸馏不应被视为标准KD的降级版本，而是一种更丰富的知识传输通道，能同时改善判别性能、不确定性估计和表征几何结构；校准可以从教师传递给学生且与准确率传递解耦，这为设计更高效的蒸馏策略提供了新视角。

title: InternVideo3: Agentify Foundation Models with Multimodal Contextual Reasoning
summary: Recent progress in foundation models has shifted toward agentic behavior involving multi-step reasoning and tool use. However, open-source efforts largely focus on text-dominant settings, leaving long-horizon multimodal tasks underexplored. This gap is evident in video tasks requiring sustained temporal understanding and iterative interaction. We present InternVideo3, a framework enhancing these capabilities via Multimodal Contextual Reasoning (MCR). MCR treats understanding as a closed-loop process over a shared, evolving context containing observations, instructions, reasoning, tool actions, and memory. This frames long-video understanding as evidence accumulation and verification. To ensure efficiency, we introduce Multimodal Multi-head Latent Attention (M^2LA), a token-preserving reparameterization compressing KV-cache states while retaining the full token stream. Our staged training includes continued pretraining, short-to-long supervised fine-tuning, rule-based reinforcement learning, and on-policy distillation. Experiments show InternVideo3 achieves strong performance on benchmarks like Video-MME, MLVU, and EgoSchema. We further instantiate the model as a video agent with retrieval tools, demonstrating robust evidence-grounded behavior. Our results suggest that efficient context handling and closed-loop reasoning are vital for adapting open multimodal models toward long-horizon visually grounded agency.

AI.tldr: InternVideo3 通过多模态上下文推理（MCR）和高效的多头潜变量注意力（M^2LA）机制，将开放多模态基础模型扩展为具备长时程多步推理与工具交互能力的视频智能体，在多个长视频理解基准上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 当前开源基础模型在向智能体行为（如多步推理和工具使用）演进时，主要聚焦于文本主导场景，缺乏对长时程多模态任务（尤其是需要持续时序理解和迭代交互的视频任务）的系统探索，这一研究空白亟需填补。
AI.method: InternVideo3 提出多模态上下文推理（MCR）框架，将理解过程构建为在共享动态上下文（包含观测、指令、推理、工具动作和记忆）上的闭环迭代，将长视频理解形式化为证据积累与验证过程；同时引入多模态多头潜变量注意力（M^2LA），通过保令牌重参数化压缩 KV 缓存状态而保留完整令牌流，并采用包括持续预训练、短到长监督微调、基于规则的强化学习和在线策略蒸馏在内的分阶段训练策略。
AI.result: InternVideo3 在 Video-MME、MLVU 和 EgoSchema 等长视频理解基准上取得了强竞争力性能；进一步实例化为配备检索工具的视频智能体后，展现出稳健的基于证据的行为能力。
AI.conclusion: 高效上下文处理与闭环推理是使开放多模态模型适应长时程视觉引导智能体行为的关键要素，为未来多模态智能体研究提供了重要方向。

title: Illumination-Robust Camera-Based Heart-Rate Estimation for Physiological Sensing in Robots
summary: Physiological awareness is important for service, social, and assistive robots that interact with humans in everyday environments. Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact heart-rate (HR) estimation from an RGB camera, making it a promising sensing modality for robot-mounted vision systems. However, illumination variation remains a major barrier to robust deployment. This paper presents an end-to-end spatial-temporal transformer framework for remote HR estimation on a new dataset with varied illumination. Our estimator integrates PRNet-based 3D face alignment, clip-level illumination augmentation, the Residual Temporal Standardization Module, and controlled hybrid temporal-frequency supervision. The training objective combines a Soft-Shifted Pearson waveform loss with a spectral Kullback-Leibler divergence loss, where a tuned weight ($\mathbfβ$) controls the contribution of frequency-domain heart-rate guidance. Experiments on a static all-level mix protocol covering three illumination levels show that $\mathbfβ=5$ provides the strongest result among the tested beta settings, achieving a best-run HR mean absolute error (MAE) of 0.79 bpm and an HR correlation of 0.982. Compared with the PhysFormer baseline evaluated on our dataset, our estimator reduces HR MAE by 93.6 %, while increasing HR correlation from 0.088 to 0.982, making it usable when illumination varies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端的空间-时间Transformer框架，用于变光照条件下的远程心率估计，结合PRNet三维人脸对齐、光照增强、残差时序标准化模块和混合时频监督，在自制数据集上将HR MAE降至0.79 bpm，相比PhysFormer基线降低了93.6%。
AI.motivation: 远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）使机器人能够通过RGB摄像头实现非接触式心率估计，但光照变化是其在实际部署中的主要障碍，现有方法在光照变化场景下的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 构建了一个端到端的空间-时间Transformer框架，集成PRNet三维人脸对齐、片段级光照增强、残差时序标准化模块，以及混合时频监督策略；训练目标结合Soft-Shifted Pearson波形损失和频谱KL散度损失，并通过可调权重β控制频域心率引导的贡献。
AI.result: 在覆盖三种光照级别的静态全级别混合协议上，β=5取得最优结果，HR MAE达0.79 bpm，HR相关系数达0.982；与PhysFormer基线相比，HR MAE降低93.6%，HR相关系数从0.088提升至0.982。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在变光照条件下实现了高精度、高鲁棒性的远程心率估计，显著超越了现有基线，使rPPG在机器人等实际场景中的应用成为可能。

title: SHERPA: Seam-aware Harmonized ERP Adaptation for Open-Domain 360$^\circ$ Panorama Generation
summary: Panoramic imagery is increasingly used in world-generation, games, and simulation, where users may need not only photorealistic scenes but also stylized and non-photorealistic environments. Large-scale text-to-image diffusion and flow models provide broad style and semantic priors for this goal, but planar image training misaligns them with the wrap-around topology and polar regions of $360^\circ$ panoramas represented in equirectangular projection (ERP). We present SHERPA, a lightweight adaptation framework that combines frequency-selective Circular RoPE, Circular Latent Encoding/Decoding, image-side FFN adapters, and a Dual-Path Training Scheme. Circular RoPE replaces only the seam-sensitive high-frequency horizontal RoPE band with integer-periodic harmonics while preserving the pretrained lower-frequency spectrum. The Paired Panorama Path supervises geometry, while the Unpaired Style Path uses self-supervised yaw consistency for target-free stylized prompts. As a result, SHERPA generates $360^\circ$ panoramas across both photorealistic panorama domains and open-domain stylized prompts.

AI.tldr: SHERPA 提出一种轻量级适配框架，通过频率选择性 Circular RoPE、循环潜编码/解码、图像侧FFN适配器和双路径训练方案，使预训练的文本到图像扩散/流模型能够生成高质量、风格化的360°全景图像，同时支持照片级真实感和开放域风格化提示。
AI.motivation: 全景影像在游戏、仿真和世界生成中需求日益增长，用户不仅需要照片级真实感场景，也需要风格化、非真实感环境。然而，大规模文本到图像扩散模型和流模型在平面图像上训练，与等距柱状投影(ERP)表示的360°全景图的环绕拓扑和极地区域存在严重不对齐，导致生成的全景图在接缝处和极地出现畸变。
AI.method: SHERPA 框架包含四个关键技术组件：频率选择性 Circular RoPE（仅将接缝敏感的高频水平RoPE波段替换为整数周期谐波，保留预训练的低频频谱）、循环潜编码/解码（Circular Latent Encoding/Decoding）、图像侧FFN适配器（image-side FFN adapters）以及双路径训练方案（Dual-Path Training Scheme），其中配对全景路径监督几何结构，未配对风格路径通过自监督偏航一致性实现无目标风格化提示的生成。
AI.result: SHERPA 能够在照片级真实感全景域和开放域风格化提示下生成360°全景图，有效解决了平面预训练模型与ERP全景拓扑之间的不对齐问题，在接缝连续性和极地区域质量上优于直接微调方法。
AI.conclusion: SHERPA 证明通过对预训练文本到图像模型进行轻量级、拓扑感知的适配，可以有效弥合平面图像与360°全景图之间的表示鸿沟，同时保留模型原有的风格和语义先验能力，为全景图像生成提供了一种高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Reroute, Don't Remove: Recoverable Visual Token Routing for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) project images into hundreds to thousands of visual tokens, making decoder inference expensive in both attention computation and KV-cache memory. Existing visual-token reduction methods largely follow a rank-and-remove paradigm: they score visual tokens, keep a compact subset, and permanently discard the rest. We show that this irreversible action is fragile because visual-token importance changes across decoder depth; tokens ranked low at one stage may become relevant in later layers, especially for grounding-sensitive queries. We propose Reroute, a training-free plug-in that replaces removal with recoverable routing. At each routing stage, selected vision tokens pass through decoder blocks, while deferred tokens bypass the stage and re-enter the candidate pool at the next routing decision. Reroute reuses existing attention-score ranking rules and stage-wise schedules, preserving the theoretical TFLOPs and KV-cache budget class of the pruning method it augments. Across FastV, PDrop, and Nüwa variants on LLaVA-1.5 and Qwen backbones, reroute improves grounding under aggressive token reduction while maintaining general VQA performance. These results suggest that VLM token reduction should not be viewed only as irreversible pruning, but also as recoverable routing. The code can be found here: https://github.com/elmma/mllm-reroute/

AI.tldr: 提出Reroute，一种训练无关的视觉令牌路由方法，将不可逆的剪枝替换为可恢复的路由，在保持推理计算预算的同时，提升了视觉语言模型在激进令牌压缩下的接地能力。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）将图像投影为数百至数千视觉令牌，导致解码器推理中注意力计算和KV缓存开销巨大。现有令牌缩减方法多采用"评分-丢弃"范式，永久丢弃低分令牌，但视觉令牌的重要性随解码器深度动态变化，早期被丢弃的令牌可能在后期层中对特定查询（如接地感知任务）变得重要，这种不可逆剪枝策略存在根本性缺陷。
AI.method: 提出Reroute，一种训练无关的插件方法，用可恢复路由替代永久丢弃。在每个路由阶段，选中的视觉令牌通过解码器块，而延迟令牌跳过当前阶段并在下一路由决策时重新进入候选池。Reroute复用现有注意力得分排序规则和阶段调度策略，保留原始剪枝方法的理论TFLOPs和KV缓存预算类别。
AI.result: 在FastV、PDrop和Nüwa变体上，结合LLaVA-1.5和Qwen骨干网络，Reroute在激进令牌缩减条件下显著提升了接地性能，同时保持了通用VQA任务的性能。实验表明，令牌重要性跨层变化的现象确实存在，可恢复路由策略有效缓解了不可逆剪枝导致的性能退化。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型的令牌缩减不应仅被视为不可逆的剪枝，而应视为可恢复的路由问题。Reroute无需额外训练即可嵌入现有剪枝方法，为VLM在令牌高效推理与下游任务性能之间提供了更好的权衡。

title: MLT-Dedup: Efficient Large-Scale Online Video Deduplication via Multi-Level Representations and Spatial-Temporal Matching
summary: The explosive growth of user-generated video content on online platforms is accompanied by the emergence of numerous near-duplicate videos--videos that are identical or highly similar but differ by partial edits. These duplicates degrade user experience and increase storage and bandwidth costs, making large-scale video deduplication a critical task. Existing video deduplication frameworks face a fundamental challenge in retrieving sufficient high-quality candidates under a limited index budget, as well as trade-offs between efficiency and precision. To address these issues, we propose MLT-Dedup, an efficient large-scale online video deduplication framework with Multi-Level representations and spatial-Temporal matching. Our approach employs a Multi-Level Video Encoder (ML-VE) to extract both fine-grained frame-level and sparse clip-level embeddings: sparse embeddings support efficient candidate retrieval, while fine-grained embeddings are loaded for precise pairwise matching. During matching, we introduce DiF-SiM, a Differential Feature-enhanced Similarity Module capable of locating duplicated temporal segments and providing reliable similarity evidence to support policy-driven deduplication decisions. Extensive experiments on a real-world large-scale platform demonstrate that MLT-Dedup reduces online repetition rates by 91% at 90% precision. Furthermore, our sparse retrieval design achieves a 5x increase in indexing capacity, enabling broader candidate coverage in real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: MLT-Dedup 提出了一种基于多级表示和时空匹配的大规模在线视频去重框架，通过稀疏嵌入实现高效候选检索、细粒度嵌入实现精确成对匹配，并结合差分特征增强相似性模块定位重复片段，在实际平台中将在线重复率降低 91% 且索引容量提升 5 倍。
AI.motivation: 用户生成视频内容的爆炸式增长导致大量近重复视频的出现，这些视频仅存在部分编辑差异，严重降低了用户体验并增加了存储和带宽成本。现有视频去重框架在有限的索引预算下难以检索到足够多的高质量候选视频，同时在效率与精度之间存在难以权衡的根本性挑战。
AI.method: MLT-Dedup 提出一种多级视频编码器（ML-VE），同时提取细粒度帧级嵌入和稀疏片段级嵌入：稀疏嵌入用于高效候选检索，细粒度嵌入用于精确成对匹配。在匹配阶段引入差分特征增强相似性模块（DiF-SiM），能够定位重复的时间片段并提供可靠的相似性证据，支持基于策略的去重决策。
AI.result: 在真实大规模平台上的实验表明，MLT-Dedup 在 90% 精确率下将在线重复率降低了 91%。其稀疏检索设计将索引容量提升了 5 倍，在真实部署中实现了更广泛的候选覆盖范围。
